plugins.name: dogfu
plugins.description: Sales toolkit powered by the dogfu CLI: lead-research (Discover → Qualify → Enrich → CRM), lead-touch (cold outreach cadence in Close), lead-engage (work live deals — opportunities — from first engagement to close), crm-cleanup (read-only audit of the CRM for leads/tasks that fell out of the flow), and berlin-theme (Berlin's brand style guide for on-brand sales collateral).
